notes.syncMovementOfMultipleMaps: Uses @mapbox/mapbox-gl-sync-move@0.3.1 plugin — syncMaps(map1, map2, map3). Not vanilla event-based.
notes.visualizePopulationDensity: Dataset fields: population (int) and sq-km (float). Density calculated in runtime via MapLibre expression: ['/', ['get', 'population'], ['get', 'sq-km']]. Range: 274 (East) to 1551 (Kigali) hab/km2.
